description: Phase 005 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. Decision-gated final phase. If phase 004 benchmark satisfies the decision rule: flip cross-encoder.ts default to Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B, set SPECKIT_CROSS_ENCODER=true in 4 runtime configs, update docs. Else: ship sidecar as opt-in only, update docs to explain. Either way, arc 008 closes with this phase.
